'''Blevon''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and was codenamed '''Rainbow One''', responsible for operations management during the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. Stationed on the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Liberator'']], he often spoke with [[Bria Tharen]], who commanded the operation on the ground. She always informed him about current events at the front.

{{Char-stub}}
